name: Virtuous Nonprofit CRM & Fundraising API
what_it_does: Virtuous REST API for responsive fundraising and nonprofit CRM platform. Enables AI agents to manage contact and donor profile management, handle gift and donation recording and receipting, access fundraising campaign and journey automation, retrieve donation analytics and fundraising performance, manage communication workflows and email marketing, handle major gift cultivation and prospect management, access volunteer management and engagement data, retrieve gift segmentation and donor intelligence, manage event management and registration, and integrate nonprofit CRM with accounting and marketing automation systems.
use_cases: Managing donor profiles and gift recording from nonprofit CRM agents
Handling fundraising campaign automation from donor engagement agents
Retrieving donation analytics and segmentation from fundraising intelligence agents
Integrating nonprofit CRM with email marketing from donor communication agents
not_for: Large institutional nonprofits requiring Blackbaud enterprise scale
For-profit businesses without nonprofit donor management needs
Grant-heavy foundations without major gift cultivation focus
best_when: A mid-size nonprofit using Virtuous wants AI agents to automate donor engagement, gift recording, campaign workflows, donor segmentation, and marketing automation integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Donor and constituent data is sensitive PII — giving history and engagement data requires secure handling. Automated outreach must respect donor communication preferences and opt-outs. Gift acceptance and tax receipt accuracy is critical for donor trust and IRS compliance.

auth.notes: Virtuous uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials for CRM and fundraising data. Developer documentation at virtuouscrm.com/developer. Webhooks for contact and gift events. Strong Mailchimp, Constant Contact, and QuickBooks integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — nonprofit CRM subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user subscription; Essentials, Scale, and Enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: Phoenix, Arizona. Founded 2014. Responsive fundraising nonprofit CRM. $50M+ in funding. 1,000+ nonprofit customers. Used by food banks, faith-based organizations, and social service nonprofits. Responsive fundraising model based on donor behavior signals. Competes with Bloomerang and Blackbaud for mid-market nonprofit CRM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; bulk operations throttled

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Donor data includes PII and giving history — communication opt-outs must be respected by automated outreach
Gift receipt accuracy — automated gift entry must generate accurate tax receipts for donor IRS deductions
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer documentation
OAuth lacks fine-grained scopes — all-or-nothing account access; create dedicated integration user
Responsive fundraising model requires donor signal data — agent integrations should include engagement event tracking
Mid-market product — API capabilities are less mature than Blackbaud SKY API; verify feature availability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nonprofit donor and gift data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US data residency. Donor PII and charitable giving record accuracy.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nonprofit CRM data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US data residency. Donor PII and giving history sensitivity.
